1.0.0.en: Initial release — 83 tools to control Homey Pro from any AI agent via the Model Context Protocol. Devices, flows, advanced flows, zones, logic variables, alarms, energy, insights, notifications, apps, users and system management.

1.0.2.en: Added Homey Pro 2026 to supported models list
